name: Milky Way Cake Sqm
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Milky Way candy bars and butter in a double boiler.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Cream the remaining butter with sugar until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Add buttermilk alternately with flour and baking soda, stirring gently after each addition.
7. Mix in vanilla extract.
8. Fold in the melted Milky Way candy bar mixture until combined.
9. Pour batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
10. Bake for 1 hour, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Let cool for 15 minutes in the pan before turning out onto a wire rack.
Note: The nougat texture of Milky Way candy makes this cake perfect as a heavy, moist foundation for scoops of ice cream.
